completed_tasks.name: Update PROJECT.md with v1.5 milestone scope

remaining_tasks.name: Write .planning/research/SUMMARY.md synthesizing the 4 research docs (overwrite stale 2026-04-13 file); resolve library conflict to @dnd-kit/core rebuild
Define .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md via category-by-category scoping using FEATURES.md 6 categories (A/B/C/D/E/F)
Spawn gsd-roadmapper to create ROADMAP.md starting Phase 27

blockers.description: Sonnet model rate limit hit during research phase; resets 3am Europe/Bucharest. Roadmapper agent runs on Sonnet.
blockers.workaround: Wait for reset before spawning gsd-roadmapper; summary synthesis can proceed on Opus 4.7.

decisions.decision: Rebuild DnD on @dnd-kit/core@^6.3.1 with a single PointerSensor
decisions.rationale: STACK research identified 3 hard blockers against Pragmatic DnD: (1) issue #203 transform:scale() incompatibility, (2) issue #165 ESC-cancel platform-gated by native HTML5 DnD, (3) iOS Safari 15 native touch DnD flakiness. @dnd-kit also lets us keep @dnd-kit/sortable + @dnd-kit/utilities; total ~16 kB gzip.

decisions.decision: Root cause of Phase 25 DnD failures: using TouchSensor + MouseSensor simultaneously violates dnd-kit docs + JSX attribute order collision on LeafNode (spread before explicit onPointerDown)
decisions.rationale: Documented in PITFALLS.md items 1 and 2. Fix: replace both sensors with single PointerSensor; ensure explicit onPointerDown never follows listener spread.

decisions.decision: File drop, overlay drag, and divider resize stay on their current native-pointer implementations
decisions.rationale: User confirmed: include only if unification yields debugging/maintenance gains. File drop is native HTML5 (already working Phase 8 DROP-01/DROP-02). Divider uses setPointerCapture intentionally. Overlay drag is separate domain.

decisions.decision: Reduce press-and-hold delay from current 500ms to 250ms with 5px tolerance
decisions.rationale: 500ms collides with iOS 17.2+ image-action menu (PITFALLS.md item 4); 250ms is the @dnd-kit recommended value and matches HIG.

decisions.decision: Ephemeral drag state lives in a separate vanilla Zustand store (dragStore), NOT gridStore
decisions.rationale: Prevents pollution of undo/redo history; gridStore.moveCell already has early-return no-op guards at lines 473-494 so no store changes needed.

next_action: Write .planning/research/SUMMARY.md synthesizing the 4 research docs. Resolve library conflict explicitly: @dnd-kit/core rebuild wins (STACK's 3 blockers decisive); ARCHITECTURE's layout stands but adapter file is src/dnd/adapter/dndkit.ts (DndContext/PointerSensor/DragOverlay/useDraggable/useDroppable) not pragmatic.ts; drop useFileDropTarget.ts.
context_notes: Milestone scope was locked-in via two user rounds + confirmation. User explicitly wants: grab cursor on hover, press-and-hold affordance, drag-start animation, semi-opaque cell-content preview, 5-icon drop-zone overlay (1 central swap + 4 edge inserts with bright/dim active states), ESC-to-cancel, library-backed (not custom). User plans to add more phases iteratively. Visual UI/UX first; interactions later. Anti-features confirmed: no multi-select, no keyboard DnD, no auto-scroll.
